THE PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO MEET AND CONFER PRIOR TO JANUARY 24, 2025 IN AN EFFORT TO RESOLVE ALL REMAINING DISPUTES AND, FAILING DOING SO, TO DISCUSS THE RETENTION OF A DISCOVERY REFEREE FOR THIS CASE. HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BEATRIZ OLIVA's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant/Cross-Complainant Dr. Elias Hanna, Or Alternatively For An Order Precluding Testimony By Defendant At Trial And/Or To Strike Defendants Discovery Responses; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant, Carle Mackie Power Ross LLP, And Johnson Fantl & Aulenta LLP In The Amount Of $9,496.50.

Defendant/cross-defendant Elias Hanna stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. Counsel for Elias Hanna authorizes the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on his behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is granted in part. Defendant Elias Hanna is prohibited from testifying at deposition or trial in this case. Defendant did not oppose this part of plaintiff's motion.

The Court instructs counsel for Elias Hanna to prepare a proposed order, serve it on the opposing side for approval as to form, and then submit the proposed order to the pro tem judge at bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com.
